title: NaCl Clean-Checkout Evidence Artifact
description: Evidence captured by nacl-tl-deliver Step 4b (clean-checkout gate) on a shallow clone of the wave-tip commit. Consumed by nacl-tl-deploy as the gate-quality proof that the deployed commit was built and smoked from a fresh tree, not a warm local cache. One file per delivered commit at .tl/clean-checkout/<commit>.json. Schema introduced in W9-ci-clean-checkout.

commit.description: Full git SHA (40 hex chars) of the wave-tip commit that was clean-checkout-verified. nacl-tl-deploy compares this against the deployed SHA; mismatch -> DEPLOY HALTED — BLOCKED (clean-checkout-commit-mismatch).

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the clean-checkout gate began (shallow clone start).

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the clean-checkout gate terminated (PASS or BLOCKED).

build_status.description: Result of clean-checkout install + build (pnpm install --frozen-lockfile then pnpm -r build, or package-manager equivalent). FAIL implies terminal_status: BLOCKED with blocker_detail one of clean-checkout-install-failed, clean-checkout-build-failed, clean-checkout-prisma-generate-missing, or clean-checkout-pm-ambiguous.

migrate_status.description: Result of running config.yaml -> build.migrate_cmd against config.yaml -> build.test_database_url. SKIPPED when no migrate_cmd is configured (project has no DB tooling). FAIL implies terminal_status: BLOCKED with blocker_detail clean-checkout-test-database-url-undefined or clean-checkout-migrate-failed.

smoke_status.description: Result of booting the entrypoint and curling deploy.smoke.endpoints. PASS_HEALTH_ONLY indicates the project did not declare product endpoints (only /api/health was hit) — this is not product-readiness evidence, mirroring the W4 stance on HEALTH_ONLY at the release-time gate. FAIL implies terminal_status: BLOCKED with blocker_detail clean-checkout-smoke-failed or clean-checkout-entrypoint-no-port.

runtime_assets_verified.description: Per-entry assertion of config.yaml -> runtime_assets after the clean build. Every declared path is checked for presence. Any false entry implies terminal_status: BLOCKED with blocker_detail clean-checkout-runtime-assets-missing.

path.description: Path relative to project root after build, as declared in config.yaml -> runtime_assets.

present.description: true if the file or directory exists in the built artifact tree, false otherwise.

kind.description: Optional: stat-kind. Omitted on present:false (kind: missing implied).

terminal_status.description: Overall gate verdict. PASS only when build_status:PASS AND migrate_status in (PASS,SKIPPED) AND smoke_status in (PASS,PASS_HEALTH_ONLY) AND every runtime_assets_verified[].present is true. Anything else is BLOCKED.

blocker_detail.description: Workflow detail string identifying the specific blocker. Required when terminal_status: BLOCKED; absent when PASS. Recognized values: clean-checkout-install-failed, clean-checkout-build-failed, clean-checkout-prisma-generate-missing, clean-checkout-pm-ambiguous, clean-checkout-test-database-url-undefined, clean-checkout-migrate-failed, clean-checkout-smoke-failed, clean-checkout-entrypoint-no-port, clean-checkout-runtime-assets-missing.

package_manager.description: Resolved package manager used for the clean-checkout install. Recorded for traceability.

entrypoint.description: Resolved entrypoint that was booted for the smoke step. Recorded for traceability (catches the dist/index.js vs dist/server.js confusion).

smoke_endpoints_hit.description: Per-endpoint smoke result. Used by nacl-tl-deploy to surface which endpoint failed when smoke_status: FAIL.

exception_id.description: If terminal_status: BLOCKED was bypassed via a signed exception covering the named blocker_detail, the exception_id is recorded here so downstream nacl-tl-deploy can verify the bypass without re-loading the exception file. Format: EXC-YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.

emergency_bypass.description: If terminal_status: BLOCKED was bypassed via NACL_EMERGENCY=1, this flag is true and the closed delivery Status: carries (emergency-bypass).
